accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: ASC 606 / ASU 2021-02 practical expedient. Initial fees: recognized at opening (pre-opening services = single PO). Transfer/renewal fees: recognized over term. CFF: as franchisee sales occur. Managed services: monthly. Ad fund: as franchisee sales occur.
accounting_policies.depreciation: Straight-line for financial; accelerated for tax. Useful lives 3-10 years. Leasehold improvements: useful life for common-control leases; shorter of life or term for others.
accounting_policies.advertising_fund: Contributions recognized as franchisee sales occur. Restricted cash maintained separately. Franchisor does not contribute.
accounting_policies.deferred_franchise_fees: Contract liability until pre-opening services complete. $175K (2024), $50K (2023), $180K (2022).
accounting_policies.deferred_franchise_costs: Sales commissions amortized over franchise term. Current: $355K; Non-current: $1,701K (2024).

lease_rent_structure.type: No direct leases — office leased by Parent
lease_rent_structure.building_ownership: Building owned by parties related to Parent's owner
lease_rent_structure.rou_assets: Not applicable — no direct leases recognized by Company

parent_affiliate_structure.allocation_basis: Percentage of support provided by Parent

tax_structure.federal: QSSS — no federal tax at entity level. All items flow to parent of FSI.

subsequent_events: Evaluated through March 24, 2025. No material events disclosed.
